source_pr.title: topsql: fix data race in reporter test
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: mornyx <mornyx.z@gmail.com>

Issue Number: close #31251

### Release note

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: topsql: fix data race in reporter test
failure_signature: topsql: fix data race in reporter test
root_cause_explanation: The flakiness was caused by a data race in the TopSQL reporter tests: a background goroutine can call into the mock data-sink stream while the test also observes/mutates the same in-memory state, and the mock was not synchronized. This PR stabilizes the tests by adding proper synchronization (e.g., mutex protection) around the mock stream's internal records/metadata collections.
fix_pattern: Make test mocks concurrency-safe (add synchronization around shared state used by background goroutines).

evidence: evidence: topsql: fix data race in reporter test

analysis:

Picked test: type=unit path=util/topsql/reporter/pubsub_test.go name=pubsub_test
